description: A high-conversion email-capture banner with a deep red gradient background. Left column has a yellow badge + headline + body + an inline newsletter signup form (rendered by the forms extension via slug 'newsletter'). Right column is a rotated image of the freebie (a PDF map mockup, a printable, a checklist, etc.).

fields.description: The primary title of the section — name the freebie clearly.
fields.name: heading
fields.title: Heading

fields.description: Short pitch — what the reader gets and why it's worth their email.
fields.name: body
fields.title: Body

fields.description: Rotated photo or mockup of the deliverable (PDF cover, printable, etc.). Yellow background tints behind it on missing photo.
fields.name: image
fields.title: Freebie Image

fields.description: Monospace overlay caption, only visible when no photo is set.
fields.name: image_label
fields.title: Image placeholder label

name: Lead Magnet Banner

test_data.body: Every bún chả, bánh mì, and egg coffee spot we actually eat at. Numbered, mapped, ranked, and updated every month.
test_data.heading: The Hanoi Street Food Map.
